pcs.name: Slasher
pcs.skills:
Acrobatics +5, Sleight of Hand +5, Stealth +7 (Expertise), Deception +4
Passive Perception: 12
pcs.features:
GREAT WEAPON FIGHTING (Style): When rolling damage for an attack with a two-handed weapon, reroll any 1 or 2 — must use new roll.
SECOND WIND (Bonus Action, 1/Short Rest): Regain 1d10+3 HP as a bonus action.
ACTION SURGE (1/Short Rest): Take one additional action on your turn.
ACID BREATH (Action, Recharge 5-6): 5x30ft line, all creatures make DC 13 CON save or take 2d6 acid damage (half on success).
ACID RESISTANCE: Resistance to acid damage.
HEAVY ARMOR PROFICIENCY: Wearing chain mail (AC 16). Disadvantage on Stealth checks.
GREATSWORD: 2d6 slashing, heavy, two-handed. Primary weapon.
SMITH'S TOOLS: Proficient. Handles all equipment maintenance and repairs.
GUILD MEMBERSHIP: Can call on the Smith's Guild for support, lodging, and contacts.
HONEST TO A FAULT: Cannot deceive. Genuinely baffled by Tinkle and Pebble's methods.
PROTECTOR: Sworn to keep Tinkle and Pebble safe.
COMBAT SUPERIORITY: 4 Superiority Dice (d8s) per short rest.
MANEUVERS: Bait & Switch (swap with ally, add d8 to roll for AC), Precision Attack (add d8 to hit after roll), Trip Attack (add d8 damage, target makes DC 13 STR save or falls prone).
pcs.backstory_origin: Born to a family of smiths with a proud name and a longer history. Grew up with metal and fire, not words. Left the forge to become an adventurer because he believes the best smiths must first understand what their weapons endure. Has never been in a situation that required talking his way out.
pcs.backstory_motivation: Forge himself into the perfect weapon. Become the best smith of his name. Every scar earned adventuring is research.
pcs.backstory_secret: Genuinely does not understand that Tinkle's Tinctures is a con operation. He thinks they are a legitimate traveling apothecary. He is very proud to be part of something that helps people.

resources.name: Action Surge
resources.desc: Take one additional action on your turn

resources.name: Superiority Dice
resources.desc: d8 — Bait & Switch / Precision Attack / Trip Attack

inventory.name: Smith's Tools
inventory.notes: Proficient. Used for party equipment maintenance and repairs.

inventory.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
inventory.notes: Rope, torches, rations, waterskin, tinderbox, backpack.

pcs.name: Tinkle
pcs.features:
NATURAL ARMOR: AC 17 flat. Cannot wear armor. Shields allowed.
SHELL DEFENSE (Reaction or Hide Action): Withdraw into shell. Gain +4 AC (AC 21), become prone and incapacitated. Emerge using Bonus Action.
SNEAK ATTACK (2d6): Once per turn when attacking with advantage OR when an ally is adjacent to target.
CUNNING ACTION: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a Bonus Action each turn.
THIEVES CANT: Secret underworld language.
EXPERTISE: Deception and Investigation at double proficiency.
HOLD BREATH: Up to 1 hour.
CLAWS: 1d4 slashing natural weapon.
BLOWGUN: 1d1 piercing, range 25/100ft. Loaded with Torpor Poison (DC 15 CON save or incapacitated for 4d6 hours).
MAGE HAND LEGERDEMAIN: Mage Hand is invisible, can pick pockets, disarm traps, or stow objects remotely.
THE MASTERMIND: Manufactures the tonics, runs the operation, writes the labels.
pcs.magic:
Spellcasting: Intelligence | Save DC: 13 | Attack Bonus: +5
Cantrips: Mage Hand, Message, Prestidigitation
Level 1 Spells: Disguise Self, Find Familiar (Rat), Sleep
pcs.backstory_origin: Leads a trio of traveling grifters. Rolls into towns with "The Shelled Alchemist" wagon, laden with shimmering useless vials. Has been doing this long enough to have a system.
pcs.backstory_motivation: Maximum profit, minimum effort. The placebo effect is a documented scientific phenomenon.
pcs.backstory_secret: Perpetually one bad batch away from a bounty. Keeps the party moving before locals realize the side effects. Secretly fears Slasher or Pebble will decide he is more trouble than he is worth.

inventory.name: Troll-Blood
inventory.notes: Collected at Goodbarrel Logistics HQ loading dock.

inventory.name: Iron-bound Lockbox
inventory.notes: Seized on road 2 miles outside Greenest.

inventory.name: Draconic Fangs
inventory.notes: Harvested from Old Mill — two separate collections.

inventory.name: Black Dragon Mask
inventory.notes: Recovered from the Sanctum, Cleft of Sighs.

inventory.name: Mask-Lined Lead Box
inventory.notes: For safely transporting the Black Dragon Mask.

pcs.name: Pebble
pcs.skills: Persuasion +7 (Expertise), Deception +7 (Expertise), Performance +5, Insight +2, Perception +2, Arcana +3, Sleight of Hand +4
pcs.features:
LITTLE GIANT: Counts as Large size for carrying capacity (240 lb) and push/drag/lift (480 lb).
STONES ENDURANCE (2/Long Rest): Reaction to reduce damage by 1d12+2. If reduced to 0, active concentration is automatically protected.
LUCKY FEAT (3 Points/Long Rest): Spend 1 point to gain Advantage on a d20 Test OR impose Disadvantage on an attack against you.
BARDIC INSPIRATION (3/Long Rest): Bonus Action, give a d6 die to a target within 60ft. They may add it to one d20 Test within 10 minutes, after seeing the roll.
JACK OF ALL TRADES: Add +1 (half proficiency) to any ability check not already including proficiency.
SONG OF REST: Allies who spend Hit Dice during a Short Rest regain an extra 1d6 HP.
COLLEGE OF LORE — BONUS PROFICIENCIES: Gained Perception, Arcana, and Sleight of Hand.
COLLEGE OF LORE — CUTTING WORDS: Use a Bardic Inspiration die as a Reaction to subtract the roll from an enemy's attack, ability check, or damage roll — declared before outcome.
THE PITCHMAN: Public face of Tinkle Tonics. High CHA is the product.
pcs.magic:
Spellcasting: Charisma | Save DC: 13 | Attack Bonus: +5
Cantrips: Friends, Vicious Mockery
1st-Level Spells: Charm Person, Healing Word, Sleep
2nd-Level Spells: Lesser Restoration, Suggestion
pcs.backstory_origin: Born to a clan of stone giant-descended traders who measured worth in contracts honored and debts repaid. Pebble is the smallest of their kin — hence the name.
pcs.backstory_motivation: Prove that words and wit can move mountains that strength cannot. The Tinctures operation is the proof of concept.
pcs.backstory_secret: Once talked a rival merchant caravan into a ruinous deal that bankrupted three families. Still not entirely sure it was wrong.

resources.name: Bardic Inspiration
resources.desc: Bonus action, 60ft range, d6, target adds after seeing roll

resources.name: Stone's Endurance
resources.desc: Reaction, 1d12+2 damage reduction, 0 damage = concentration protected

resources.name: Lucky Points
resources.desc: Spend for self-advantage on d20 test OR impose disadvantage on attack vs you

inventory.name: Tuned Wyrmspeaker's Staff
inventory.notes: Attuned and tuned at the Sanctum. Functions as arcane focus and conduit.

inventory.name: Potion of Healing
inventory.notes: 2d4+2 HP. Two potions acquired during Cleft infiltration.

inventory.name: Scroll of Protection from Evil and Good
inventory.notes: Two scrolls acquired during Cleft infiltration.

worldData.loc_desc: The party has cleared the Cleft of Sighs and is moving through the foothills and weald east of Greenest.
worldData.plot:
- Black Dragon Cult (Cult of the Dragon) is active in the region. The party has infiltrated and partially dismantled a cell at the Cleft of Sighs.
- Durgrim Ironheart controls the forge district. Allied.
- A Cultist Lieutenant and Kobold Assistant are secured in the wagon holding cells.
- Unmapped trade routes near the eastern hazard zone.
worldData.secrets:
- The ginger bug fermentation unlocks a special brew recipe.
- The Black Dragon Mask is a genuine cult artifact — its true value to the cult is unknown.
- The Cultist Ledger and Wyrmspeaker's Shift Ledger contain operational intelligence.
worldData.timers:
- Ginger bug completing in ~1 campaign day (Day 3)
- Durgrim's forge contract deadline: Day 7
- Cultist Lieutenant interrogation window is closing
travelLog: Day 1, 9:00 AM: Goodbarrel Logistics HQ | Opening pitch to laborers
Day 1, Afternoon: Goodbarrel Logistics HQ → Road toward Greenest | Travel
Day 1, Evening: Greenest Road → 2 miles outside Greenest | Ambush and loot recovery
Day 1, Night: Road → Ravine (2 miles from Greenest) | Half-dragon encounter and harvesting
Day 2, 2:00 AM: Ravine → Old Mill | Prisoner extraction, reagent harvest
Day 2, 5:30 AM: Old Mill → Greenest Temple Courtyard | Draconic Truth Serum acquired
Day 2, 7:30 AM: Greenest → Road to Cleft of Sighs | Travel
Day 2, 8:40 AM: Road → Cleft of Sighs, Tunnel Junction | Infiltration begins
Day 2, 9:10 AM: Tunnel Junction → The Sanctum | Boss encounter, Black Dragon Mask recovered
Day 2, 10:30 AM: The Sanctum → Foothills | Withdrawal after Sanctum
Day 2, 2:30 PM: Foothills → Whispering Weald | Reagent forage

businessProfile.name: Tinkle's Tinctures
businessProfile.realStock: Troll-Blood reagents, Blue Half-Dragon biologics, Draconic materials, Draconic Truth Serum
businessProfile.snakeOil: Elixir of Endless Vitality (rainwater + beet juice). Standard product line.
businessProfile.reagents: Whispering Moss, Shadow-Cap Mushrooms, Ironwood Bark, Draconic Blood, Blue Half-Dragon parts
businessProfile.notes: Wagon holds Cultist Lieutenant and Kobold Assistant as prisoners in holding cells.

worldData.primaryMission: Establish Tinkle's Tinctures as a profitable operation while operating covertly alongside cult activity. Current: return to Greenest or press further east.
worldData.scene_threat: Interrogation of Cultist Lieutenant pending. Cult may know their sanctum was breached.
worldData.scene_cond: All party members at full HP. Grit fed. Wagon loaded with prisoners and cult artifacts.

npcs.name: Durgrim Ironheart
npcs.details: Dwarf Guildmaster of the forge district. Demands automated iron ore shipments.

npcs.name: Cultist Lieutenant
npcs.details: Prisoner in wagon holding cell. Secured with Masterwork Shackles. Interrogation pending.

npcs.name: Kobold Assistant
npcs.details: Prisoner in wagon holding cell. Kobold underling — possibly more cooperative than the Lieutenant.

npcs.name: Bramble
npcs.details: Sour-faced dwarf shift manager at Goodbarrel Logistics HQ. Was suspicious of the wagon operation.

quests.text: Secure forge contract verification paperwork from Durgrim.
Cultivate and stabilize ginger bug starter compound.
Interrogate the Cultist Lieutenant — learn what the Cult of the Dragon is doing in the region.
Identify the contents of the two sealed scroll cases.
Determine the value and risk of the Black Dragon Mask.

treasuryData.shared: Brewer's Supplies, Tinker's Tools, Cartography Maps, 2x Rations.

logs.body: Campaign terminal configuration updated successfully. Party tracking framework initialized.

The morning air at the Goodbarrel Logistics HQ is sharp, smelling of pine needles and the damp earth of a recent dew. The wagons are lined up like sleeping beasts, their canvas covers taut. Tinkle stands by the rear of the main wagon, checking the seal on a fresh batch of 'Elixir of Endless Vitality.' Pebble is tuning a lute, ready to pitch. Slasher stands guard, genuinely believing he is protecting curative distillates worth their weight in gold. Shift manager Bramble eyes the wagon with a clipboard.

Road ambush 2 miles outside Greenest. Party looted: iron-bound lockbox, 49 gold coins, signet rings, scroll cases, cult materials. Night encounter at a ravine yielded extensive Blue Half-Dragon biologics.
Old Mill infiltration. Storage Room secured: Cultist Lieutenant and Kobold Assistant taken prisoner. Masterwork Shackles used. Draconic Fangs and Blood harvested from main floor.
Greenest Temple Courtyard. Draconic Truth Serum and Binding Contract (Draconic/Chemical) acquired.

Cleft of Sighs infiltration. Tunnel Junction: Pebble acquired Tranquilizer Crossbow, Studded Leather Armor, Sedative Bolts, Wyrmspeaker's Staff, Ritual Key. Tinkle: Necrotic Oil, Smuggler's Ledger, Pristine Alembic.

The Sanctum breach. Black Dragon Mask recovered by Tinkle. Pebble's Wyrmspeaker's Staff was tuned — now a functioning arcane focus (Tuned Wyrmspeaker's Staff). Cult Identity Marker and Breath-Fire Oil also recovered.
Whispering Weald forage. Tinkle collected: Whispering Moss x2, Shadow-Cap Mushrooms, Ironwood Bark. Party in recovery position. Wagon: prisoners secured, cult artifacts stowed.

logSummary:
DAY 1: Party opened at Goodbarrel Logistics HQ (shift manager Bramble suspicious). Traveled toward Greenest. Road ambush — looted iron-bound lockbox, 49 gold, signet rings, scroll cases, cult materials. Night: Ravine encounter — harvested extensive Blue Half-Dragon biologics (tongues, eyes, teeth, blood, scales). Acquired Cultist Ledger, Obsidian Signet Ring, Masterwork Serrated Longsword, Violet Vial (unknown).

DAY 2: Old Mill (2am) — captured Cultist Lieutenant and Kobold Assistant (now in wagon holding cells, Masterwork Shackles). Draconic Fangs x10 and Blood harvested. Greenest Temple Courtyard (5:30am) — Draconic Truth Serum + Binding Contract acquired. Road to Cleft of Sighs (7:30am) — Necrotic Oil, Pristine Alembic, Smuggler's Ledger. Cleft of Sighs infiltration (8:40am): Tunnel Junction — Pebble got Tranquilizer Crossbow, Studded Leather, Sedative Bolts x10, Wyrmspeaker's Staff, Ritual Key, Cult Gold 45gp. The Sanctum — Black Dragon Mask (Tinkle), Tuned Wyrmspeaker's Staff (Pebble, now arcane focus), Cult Identity Marker, Breath-Fire Oil x2. Foothills (10:30am) — Dragon-Fang Dagger, Mask-Lined Lead Box, Deadening Salve. Whispering Weald (2:30pm) — Whispering Moss x2, Shadow-Cap Mushrooms, Ironwood Bark.

CURRENT STATE: All PCs full HP. Grit fed. Prisoners in wagon (Cultist Lieutenant + Kobold). Black Dragon Mask in lead-lined box. Cult knows their Sanctum may have been breached. Ginger bug due Day 3. Durgrim's forge deadline Day 7.

chatHistory.content: The morning air at the Goodbarrel Logistics HQ is sharp, smelling of pine needles and the damp earth of a recent dew. The wagons are lined up like sleeping beasts, their canvas covers taut. Tinkle stands by the rear of the main wagon, checking the seal on a fresh batch of 'Elixir of Endless Vitality.' Pebble is tuning a lute. Slasher stands guard, genuinely proud to be protecting what he believes are legitimate curative distillates.

prevSessionSummary: Session 1 covered Day 1 and most of Day 2. Party opened at Goodbarrel Logistics HQ. Night road ambush yielded cult materials and half-dragon biologics. Old Mill infiltration captured a Cultist Lieutenant and Kobold Assistant (now prisoners in wagon). Infiltrated the Cleft of Sighs — reached The Sanctum, recovered the Black Dragon Mask and tuned Pebble's staff. Currently in the Whispering Weald after forage. All party full HP. Prisoners secured. Multiple cult intelligence items in hand.

moduleProgress.name: Episode 1 — Greenest in Flames
moduleProgress.notes: Party is operating alongside the cult incursion — not yet defending Greenest directly.

dmSecrets: Cultist Lieutenant knows the location of the Raiders' Camp. Kobold may break under mild pressure. Black Dragon Mask radiates faint abjuration magic — someone with Arcana could detect it.

ox.name: Grit
ox.backstory: Raised from a calf by Tinkle. The only member of the operation who has never been asked to lie about anything. Has been used as a test subject for new batches on at least three documented occasions.
ox.personality: Stoic and dependable. Unusually calm around Tinkle specifically. Skittish around loud magic. Stubborn on roads he has decided are bad ideas.

bonds.tinkle: Deeply bonded — raised from calf. Tolerates the experiments with resigned dignity.
bonds.pebble: Comfortable. Responds well to Pebble's voice. Possibly the most normal relationship on the wagon.
bonds.slasher: Wary. Has learned that when Slasher gets excited, something loud is about to happen.

quirks: Refuses to cross bridges at a trot — walk only
Has a scar on his left flank from Experiment 7 — Tinkle does not discuss this
Occasionally regarded with suspicion by other animals, cause unknown
ox.experimentLog: Vol. 3 (current). Vols 1-2 were lost in a hasty departure from Millhaven.

cells.name: Kobold Assistant
cells.notes: Smaller cell. May be cooperative with mild persuasion.
